---
title: "Multiomics TB biomarker discovery project"
author: "Zaynab Mousavian"
date: "March 1, 2026"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
subtitle: Making Tables
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

# Load R packages

```{r}
library(limma)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(dplyr)
library(grid)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(caret)
library(randomForestSRC)
library(pROC)
library(glmnet)
library(Boruta)
library(doParallel)
library(patchwork)
library(corto)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(caret)
library(ggforce)   
library(ggh4x)
library(gridGraphics)
library(cowplot)
library(Hmisc)
library(readxl)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(doParallel)
library(foreach)
library(dplyr)
```



# Make Table 1
## load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed),ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),]
dim(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult)
```

## Age

```{r}
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <-ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  mutate(SA = if_else(Study == "SA", "SA", "noSA"))

age_summary <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  group_by(TB, SA) %>%
  summarise(
    med = median(AGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1  = quantile(AGE, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3  = quantile(AGE, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(`Median (IQR)` = paste0(med, " (", Q1, "–", Q3, ")"))

# Create total by collapsing over site
age_total <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  group_by(TB) %>%      # only TB groups, ignore site
  summarise(
    med = median(AGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1  = quantile(AGE, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3  = quantile(AGE, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    site = "Total",
    `Median (IQR)` = paste0(med, " (", Q1, "–", Q3, ")")
  )
```

## Sex
```{r}
female_counts <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Sex == "F") %>%
  group_by(TB, SA) %>%
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop")

tb_totals <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Sex == "F") %>%
  group_by(TB) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")

table_data <- female_counts %>%
  left_join(tb_totals, by = "TB") %>%
  mutate(Percent = paste0(N, " (", round(N / Total * 100, 1), "%)"))

final_table <- data.frame(
  TB_SA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="Yes" & table_data$SA=="SA"],
  TB_noSA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="Yes" & table_data$SA=="noSA"],
  TB_Total = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="Yes" & table_data$SA %in% c("SA","noSA")] %>% sum(., na.rm = TRUE),
  noTB_SA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="No" & table_data$SA=="SA"],
  noTB_noSA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="No" & table_data$SA=="noSA"],
  noTB_Total = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="No" & table_data$SA %in% c("SA","noSA")] %>% sum(., na.rm = TRUE)
)
```

## HIV

```{r}
HIV_counts <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(HIV=="Positive") %>%
  group_by(TB, SA) %>%
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop")

tb_totals <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(HIV=="Positive") %>%
  group_by(TB) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")

table_data <- female_counts %>%
  left_join(tb_totals, by = "TB") %>%
  mutate(Percent = paste0(N, " (", round(N / Total * 100, 1), "%)"))

final_table <- data.frame(
  TB_SA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="Yes" & table_data$SA=="SA"],
  TB_noSA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="Yes" & table_data$SA=="noSA"],
  TB_Total = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="Yes" & table_data$SA %in% c("SA","noSA")] %>% sum(., na.rm = TRUE),
  noTB_SA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="No" & table_data$SA=="SA"],
  noTB_noSA = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="No" & table_data$SA=="noSA"],
  noTB_Total = table_data$Percent[table_data$TB=="No" & table_data$SA %in% c("SA","noSA")] %>% sum(., na.rm = TRUE)
)
```

## CXray

```{r}
HIV_counts <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(cxray=="CAVITATION") %>%
  group_by(TB, SA) %>%
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop")

tb_totals <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(cxray=="CAVITATION") %>%
  group_by(TB) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")


HIV_counts <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Speciation.Results=="DETECTED") %>%
  group_by(TB, SA) %>%
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop")

tb_totals <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Speciation.Results=="DETECTED") %>%
  group_by(TB) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")

HIV_counts <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Sputum.Results=="Positive") %>%
  group_by(TB, SA) %>%
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop")

tb_totals <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Sputum.Results=="Positive") %>%
  group_by(TB) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")

HIV_counts <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Sputum.smear==2) %>%
  group_by(TB, SA) %>%
  summarise(N = n(), .groups = "drop")

tb_totals <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult %>%
  filter(Sputum.smear==2) %>%
  group_by(TB) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")
```

## Symptoms 

```{r}
diagnosis <- read_excel("../../Data/ORD samples with diagnoses .xlsx")
SA_symptoms <- read_excel("../../Data/2025-03-03_PotPrev_Emory_Data.xlsx")
GWAS_symptoms <- read_excel("../../Data/TBGWAS_ControlSamples_30Nov2023.xlsx")
SA_symptoms$study_id <- paste0("SA",SA_symptoms$study_id)
GWAS_symptoms$`subjid without dash` <- paste0("TBG",GWAS_symptoms$`subjid without dash`)
samples <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="No")%>%select(ID)%>%unlist()

df1 <- SA_symptoms %>%
  filter(study_id %in% samples)

symptoms1 <- c("Cough","Fever...24", "Loss of weight","Night sweats")

sa_summary <- df1 %>%
  select(all_of(symptoms1)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "Symptom",
               values_to = "Response") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Response)) %>%
  group_by(Symptom) %>%
  summarise(
    n1 = sum(Response == "Yes"),
    N1 = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
sa_summary

df2 <- GWAS_symptoms %>%
  filter(`subjid without dash` %in% samples)

symptoms2 <- c("a1_cough_c_bl","a1_fever_c_bl","a1_weightloss_c_bl",
               "a1_nightsweats_c_bl")

gwas_summary <- df2 %>%
  select(all_of(symptoms2)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "Symptom",
               values_to = "Response") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Response)) %>%
  group_by(Symptom) %>%
  summarise(
    n2 = sum(Response == "1"),
    N2 = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
gwas_summary

gwas_summary$Symptom <- c("Cough","Fever...24",
                          "Loss of weight","Night sweats")

### Total
final_table <- sa_summary %>%
  inner_join(gwas_summary, by = "Symptom") %>%
  mutate(
    n_total = n1 + n2,
    N_total = N1 + N2,
    percent = round(n_total / N_total * 100, 1),
    `n (%)` = paste0(n_total, " (", percent, "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(Symptom, `n (%)`)

final_table
```



# Load metabolite, cytokine and clinical data 

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()
```

# Make train and test data  


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group <- cbind(paste0(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB,",",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$HIV))

set.seed(123) 
test_percentage <- 0.3 

test_indices <- createDataPartition(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group, p = test_percentage, list = FALSE)

sampleData_train <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[-test_indices, ]
sampleData_test <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[test_indices, ]


removed_samles_train <- which(!sampleData_train$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_train <- sampleData_train[-removed_samles_train,]
removed_samles_test <- which(!sampleData_test$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_test <- sampleData_test[-removed_samles_test,]

table(sampleData_train$TB,sampleData_train$HIV)
table(sampleData_test$TB,sampleData_test$HIV)

metaboData.train <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_train$ID,]
cytokineData.train <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_train$ID,]
sampleData.train <- sampleData_train
metaboData.test <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_test$ID,]
cytokineData.test <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_test$ID,]
sampleData.test <- sampleData_test


metaboData.train <- as.data.frame(metaboData.train)
cytokineData.train <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train)

sampleData_test_HIVpos <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Positive")
sampleData_test_HIVneg <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Negative")
sampleData_test_noTBSA <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "SA"))
sampleData_test_noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "TBGWAS"))

metaboData.test.HIVpos <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVpos <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVpos <- sampleData_test_HIVpos

metaboData.test.HIVneg <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVneg <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVneg <- sampleData_test_HIVneg

metaboData.test.noTBSA <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBSA <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBSA <- sampleData_test_noTBSA

metaboData.test.noTBGWAS <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test_noTBGWAS
```

# Make a combined data including metabolites and cytokine for feature selection 

```{r}
combinedData.train <- cbind(metaboData.train,cytokineData.train)
combinedData.test <- cbind(metaboData.test,cytokineData.test)
combinedData.train$Group= as.factor(sampleData.train$TB)
combinedData.train$Group <- factor(combinedData.train$Group, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

# Run all combinations 

```{r}
features <- c("IFN.gamma","IL.1beta","IL.22","IL.10","IFN.beta","METHIONINE",
              "OXOPROLINE","PYRUVATE","IP.10","IL.18","TNF.alpha","IL.6","C22-5-FA")

features <- c("IFN.gamma","IL.22","IL.10")

all_combinations <- unlist(lapply(3:3, function(k) {
  combn(features, k, simplify = FALSE)
}), recursive = FALSE)

length(all_combinations)

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

if(!exists("fitControl")){
  fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                             number = 10,
                             repeats = 10,
                             classProbs = TRUE,
                             summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
                             allowParallel = FALSE)   # prevent nested parallel
}

if(!exists("svmGrid")){
  svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                         C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))
}

results_list <- foreach(i = seq_along(all_combinations),
                        .packages = c("caret","pROC","dplyr")) %dopar% {

  t0 <- Sys.time()
  sel_feats <- all_combinations[[i]]

  row_result <- data.frame(
    combo_id = i,
    k = length(sel_feats),
    features = paste(sel_feats, collapse = ","),
    auc = NA_real_,
    auc_low = NA_real_,
    auc_high = NA_real_,
    sens_spec98 = NA_real_,
    sens_spec98_low = NA_real_,
    sens_spec98_high = NA_real_,
    sens_spec70 = NA_real_,
    sens_spec70_low = NA_real_,
    sens_spec70_high = NA_real_,
    n_train = NA_integer_,
    n_test = NA_integer_,
    runtime_secs = NA_real_,
    status = NA_character_,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  tryCatch({

    data_train <- as.data.frame(combinedData.train[, sel_feats, drop = FALSE])
    data_train$Class <- as.factor(gsub(" ", "", sampleData.train$TB))
    data_train$Class <- factor(data_train$Class, levels = c("Yes","No"))

    data_test <- as.data.frame(combinedData.test[, sel_feats, drop = FALSE])
    data_test$Class <- as.factor(gsub(" ", "", sampleData.test$TB))
    data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels = c("Yes","No"))

    row_result$n_train <- nrow(data_train)
    row_result$n_test <- nrow(data_test)

    set.seed(123)

    svmTune <- train(Class ~ .,
                     data = data_train,
                     method = "svmRadial",
                     preProc = c("center","scale"),
                     metric = "ROC",
                     tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                     trControl = fitControl)

    probs_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type = "prob")
    prob_yes <- probs_test[,1]

    roc_test <- roc(response = data_test$Class,
                    predictor = prob_yes,
                    levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),
                    ci = TRUE,
                    quiet = TRUE)

    auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_test))
    auc_ci <- ci.auc(roc_test)

    row_result$auc <- auc_val
    row_result$auc_low <- as.numeric(auc_ci[1])
    row_result$auc_high <- as.numeric(auc_ci[3])

    ci_spec98 <- tryCatch({
      ci.se(roc_test, specificities = 0.98)
    }, error=function(e){NULL})

    if(!is.null(ci_spec98)){
      row_result$sens_spec98 <- as.numeric(ci_spec98[1,2])
      row_result$sens_spec98_low <- as.numeric(ci_spec98[1,1])
      row_result$sens_spec98_high <- as.numeric(ci_spec98[1,3])
    } else {
      sens_est <- coords(roc_test,x=0.98,input="specificity",
                         ret="sensitivity",transpose=FALSE)
      row_result$sens_spec98 <- as.numeric(sens_est)
    }

    ci_spec70 <- tryCatch({
      ci.se(roc_test, specificities = 0.70)
    }, error=function(e){NULL})

    if(!is.null(ci_spec70)){
      row_result$sens_spec70 <- as.numeric(ci_spec70[1,2])
      row_result$sens_spec70_low <- as.numeric(ci_spec70[1,1])
      row_result$sens_spec70_high <- as.numeric(ci_spec70[1,3])
    } else {
      sens_est70 <- coords(roc_test,x=0.70,input="specificity",
                           ret="sensitivity",transpose=FALSE)
      row_result$sens_spec70 <- as.numeric(sens_est70)
    }

    row_result$status <- "OK"

  }, error=function(e){
    row_result$status <- paste0("ERROR: ",gsub("\n"," ",conditionMessage(e)))
  })

  t1 <- Sys.time()
  row_result$runtime_secs <- as.numeric(difftime(t1,t0,units="secs"))

  row_result
}

stopCluster(cl)
registerDoSEQ()

results <- bind_rows(results_list)

results_sorted <- results %>%
  arrange(desc(auc))

head(results_sorted,10)

write.csv(results,"svm_combinations_results-13markers.csv",row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(results_sorted,"svm_combinations_results_sorted-13markers.csv",row.names=FALSE)
 
message("Total combinations evaluated: ", nrow(results))
```

# Make Table 2 

```{r}
df <- read.csv("svm_combinations_results-13markers.csv")
df <- df %>%
  arrange(desc(sens_spec98+sens_spec70+auc))


df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 2)))

last_cols <- c("sens_spec98", "sens_spec98_low","sens_spec98_high")

df[last_cols] <- lapply(df[last_cols], function(x) round(x * 100, 2))

last_cols <- c("sens_spec70", "sens_spec70_low","sens_spec70_high")

df[last_cols] <- lapply(df[last_cols], function(x) round(x * 100, 2))

df$newauc <- paste0(df$auc," (",df$auc_low,"-",df$auc_high,")")
df$newsens <- paste0(df$sens_spec98,"% (",df$sens_spec98_low,"% - ",df$sens_spec98_high,"%)")
df$newsens2 <- paste0(df$sens_spec70,"% (",df$sens_spec70_low,"% - ",df$sens_spec70_high,"%)")
newdf <- df%>%select(k,features,newauc,newsens,newsens2)
write.csv(newdf, "svm_combinations_results_sorted-13markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
